title: Yes .
content:
Yes .

But yeah, like that like that.

So it's..

Survivalists.

It kind of blew my mind when I put it when I's what I say, like, it's all about that fixture that's come out the wall.

It's what it's all about.

And when you think about it like that, it's simpler.

But I like what you said about how you, when you like to work, you want everything late.

You want to show up.

And my metaphor of it is like, a surgeon walks into the surgery bay and all the stuff's there, and it's ready for him to use to get the job done.

And that's how this job should be too.

And I can't even get to work.

Like, what I'm sitting, I mean, when I'm basically on the floor , setting up stuff for handing him what he needs.

You know, I got to show him what's next.

I got to lay out the work as we go.

And I'm also trying to put the stuff in the next spot where we're gonna work, okay, like the carriers and all that.
context: From document: 4320 Mariners Cove Dr 2.m4a — chunk 83 (chunk 83/225)
